Item.Text: J110 FOUND HIGH VOLTS OF 5V SUPPLY FOR SUB CPU
J114 ERROR FOR FOUND IGN SIGNAL
J301 LOW LEVEL OF MOTOR SUPPLY
J305 INPUT VOLTS OF RR MAIN SENSOR
J306 INPUT VOLTS OF RR SUB SENSOR
J410 NOTHING MASSAGE OF VEHICLE SPEED
J420 NOTHING MASSAGE OF RUDDER SPEED
J430 NOTHING MASSAGE OF ENGINE SPEED
